name: Vignesh Sathyamoorthy
title: Senior Frontend Engineer & Tech Lead
intro: Senior Frontend Engineer with 10+ years building high-performance web applications and e-commerce for global brands including Coty, O'Reilly Auto Parts, Redsea, and Universal Music Group. I lead frontend and Shopify teams, ship headless commerce at scale, and care about clean architecture, Core Web Vitals, and mentoring engineers.
aboutSummary: I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer and Tech Lead with 10+ years of experience specializing in React, Next.js, Shopify Plus, and multi-CMS architectures. I currently lead frontend and Shopify app development at Photon, with a proven track record delivering headless commerce for internationally recognised brands.
aboutExpertise: Tech lead for frontend & Shopify — architecture, code reviews, mentoring
Coty, O'Reilly Auto Parts, Redsea, Universal Music Group — production delivery
React, Next.js, Shopify Plus, AEM, headless CMS (Contentful, Strapi, Builder.io)
Microfrontends, SSR/SSG, Core Web Vitals, WCAG accessibility
aboutExperience: I've delivered 10+ production-grade applications across e-commerce, retail, real estate, and entertainment for US, UK, AU, and Middle East clients. I translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect, performance-optimised builds and align engineering milestones with business goals.
